title: Tender British Lamb Skewers
description: A delicious and tender British dish featuring lamb skewers, perfect for a date night, with a sour twist from the lemon and a crunchy texture from the Napa cabbage. This halal-friendly recipe is sure to impress.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a broiler pan lined with aluminum foil and broil for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
While the lamb is cooking, prepare the Napa cabbage by cutting it into 1-inch pieces and rinsing with cold water.
After the lamb has cooked for 8 minutes, add the Napa cabbage to the broiler pan and cook for an additional 2-4 minutes, or until the cabbage is slightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let rest for 2 minutes before serving.
